flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bethesda University rose 128% between 2002 and 2005 ($5.4k → $12.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bethesda University fell 86% between 2021 and 2024 (13.6% → 2.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Bethesda University fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (15.2% → 11.1%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bethesda University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.6k → $7.2k).
